content:
🚀 Major Rust Helper Update! 🚀

I’ve conducted a massive overhaul of the interface and content to make your gameplay even more comfortable. The app has been completely redesigned to be as convenient and enjoyable to use as possible.

✨ What's new:

✅ New Interface & Navigation: I've simplified and optimized absolutely every section (except for the admin panel and news). Navigation is now more intuitive, and the interface is cleaner, so nothing distracts you from what matters.
✅ Rust-style Visuals: All icons now match the original in-game items. I've added a stylish red-blue neon glow to all elements to give the app a unique look.
✅ Full Optimization: The app runs faster and smoother—a lot of work has been done to ensure everything flies.

⚔️ Weapon Guides:

- Updated the guide structure for better readability.
- Added high-quality icons for all popular weapons (M16A2, M39, L96, Double Barrel, Waterpipe, SPAS-12).

⚙️ Functional improvements:

- FPS Boost: Optimized generation parameters for smoother gameplay.
- Binder: Completely redesigned the interface—copying commands for players and admins is now much easier.
- Raid Calculator: Simplified the target grid and updated the styling.

Check it out, evaluate the changes, and share your feedback! 👇
🔗 https://rustylub.github.io/Rusty.Lub/
